mentions.role_in_text: top inventor country in all four quantum technology categories
mentions.occurrence_sentence: The U.S. comes as the top inventor country in all four quantum technology categories, with particularly large numbers in Quantum Computing (4,347 patents) and Quantum Materials & Devices (10,427 patents).
The U.S. does not appear among the top patent owners in any of the four categories, despite leading in inventor countries.
The U.S. leads with the largest share of quantum startups globally while India ranks in the top 10 countries on the basis number of startups.
